subcodes.first_line: O true sisters of the honored pilgrim! Blessed are ye who are mentioned at the Sacred Threshold; blessed are ye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اخوات حقیقی جناب زائر خوشا بحال شما که در عتبه مقدسه مذکورید خوشا بحال شما
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @importance of prayer, @firmness in the Covenant
